title: WaypointHomes
description: Adds Waypoints, a more balanced and in-world alternative to a /home system
body:
# WaypointHomes Adds Waypoints and Waypoint Transporters, a more immersive and balanced alternative to the common /home system many servers use. Players can place down Waypoints, then teleport to them later using a Waypoint Transporter. ## Crafting To craft a Waypoint, you use 3 glass, an eye of ender and 1 obsidian in this pattern. To use it, you right click with it in your hand. This places down the waypoint in your current position.






To make a Waypoint Transporter, you need 2 Breeze Rods and 1 Nether Star in this pattern. To use it, right click with it in your hand. This opens up the Waypoint Transporter's GUI. In this GUI, you can teleport to and remove waypoints, as well as right click on them with an item to set it as an icon.



## The GUI

The Waypoint Transporter GUI has arrows you can use to navigate to different pages, and you can click on waypoints to teleport to them. Right clicking with an item sets that item as the Waypoint's icon, and shift-right clicking will delete the waypoint, placing it back into your inventory.


## Server Hosting (Advertisement) [![Create a server on Bisect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c367e7ba28598bc811ff7d632c22ebed744ff3.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/comet)
